name: Olive Oil Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the potatoes several times with a fork.
2. Place on a piece of paper toweling and cook at 100% power for 11 minutes, or until tender, in a 650- to 700-watt oven.
3. Remove from the oven when cool enough to handle.
4. Halve each potato and scoop out the flesh with a spoon.
5. Pass through a ricer or mash with a potato masher.
6. Stir in oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot.
Yield: 4 servings
